title: THOR RNA-sequencing results
author: Anton Markov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description:
Summarized results of RNA-sequencing performed within THOR (targeting smooth muscle cells in atherosclerosis). THOR is a collaborative project of Aarhus University and Novo Nordisk A/S as a part of the Open Discovery Innovation Network (ODIN) initiative. 

 See detailed data description in the file "DESCRIPTION.md".
steps_raw:
Summarized results of RNA-sequencing performed within THOR (targeting smooth muscle cells in atherosclerosis). THOR is a collaborative project of Aarhus University and Novo Nordisk A/S as a part of the Open Discovery Innovation Network (ODIN) initiative. 

 See detailed data description in the file "DESCRIPTION.md".
